title: Communauté de communes Campagne de Caux
summary: The communauté de communes Campagne de Caux is located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy  region of northern France. It was created on 31 December 1997. Its seat is Goderville. Its area is 145.3 km2, and its population was 15,059 in 2018.
text:
The communauté de communes Campagne de Caux is located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy  region of northern France. It was created on 31 December 1997. Its seat is Goderville. Its area is 145.3 km2, and its population was 15,059 in 2018.
